name: Babi Ketjap (Pork in Soy Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cook the pork in a covered pan until done.
3. Remove from oven and let cool.
4. Cut meat very fine (1/8 inch by 1/2).
5. Grind onion, garlic, ginger, and chili in a food processor.
6. Fry mixture in meat drippings until golden (15-20 minutes).
7. Add ketjap manis, water, and diced pork.
8. Simmer about 20 minutes.
